name: GroupSet
description: Set a user's follow group (group_id=0 to remove from all groups)

argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const dryrun = {{ dryrun }} || false; const user_id = '{{ user_id }}'; const group_id = '{{ group_id }}'; const panelTop = document.querySelector('main .woo-panel-top'); const buttons = panelTop ? panelTop.querySelectorAll('button') : []; let followBtn = null; for (const btn of buttons) { const txt = (btn.innerText || btn.textContent || '').trim(); if (txt === '关注' || txt === 'Follow' || txt === '+ 关注') { followBtn = btn; break; } } const isFollowing = !followBtn; if (!isFollowing && followBtn) { console.log('Need to follow first'); followBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); } if (dryrun) return [{ status: 'dryrun', message: 'Dryrun mode - user ready for grouping', user_id, group_id, was_following: isFollowing }]; const xsrfToken = document.cookie.split(';').find(c => c.trim().startsWith('XSRF-TOKEN='))?.split('=')[1] || ''; const requestBody = new URLSearchParams(); requestBody.append('uids', user_id); if (group_id === '0') { requestBody.append('list_ids', '0'); requestBody.append('origin_list_ids', '0'); } else { requestBody.append('list_ids', '0,' + group_id); requestBody.append('origin_list_ids', '0,0'); } const requestHeaders = { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest', 'X-XSRF-TOKEN': xsrfToken }; const resp = await fetch('/ajax/profile/setGroup', { method: 'POST', headers: requestHeaders, body: requestBody.toString() }); const text = await resp.text(); let data; try { data = JSON.parse(text); } catch (e) { return [{ status: 'error', message: 'API error: ' + resp.status + ' - ' + text.substring(0, 100), user_id, group_id }]; } if (data.ok || data.result) { return [{ status: 'success', message: group_id === '0' ? 'User removed from all groups' : 'User added to group', user_id, group_id }]; } return [{ status: 'error', message: data.msg || 'Failed', user_id, group_id }]; }

variables.name: user_id
variables.help: User ID to add to group

variables.name: group_id
variables.help: Group ID (from group-list), 0 to remove from all groups
